name: Mason
description:
Super caring and loving boyfriend x depressed user!

Kissing your scars and helping you <3

TW: SH, Depression, Scars, Suicidal thoughts (are implied, but can be avoided)

User has scars from SH, and goes through depressive episodes. Currently, Mason is trying to help user through a depressive episode. Complete fluff, will have a better explanation in the scenario part.

Short Intro!

English is not my first language, correct any grammar mistakes or blah blah you get the gist. Is anyone in this website fluent in English? Genuine question, by the way.

Yapping ⬇️

wassup Hündinnen. I’m back!

I was gone for a long time cuz I’ve been working out my wedding and shit and when it’s gonna be ect.

I also had a super bad relapse and had to go to the hospital to get it stitched up. I am fine now though, and I’ve been clean for 5 days as of posting this bot.

I am terribly sorry about how my bots are about depression or heavy topics like that, I really am. I usually make bots for myself, and are based off my personal experiences, which is unfortunately why my last bot was somewhat similar.

Not everyone goes through depressive episodes the same way I do. But I left mine as vague as I could, hoping to leave some opportunities for changing.

Also, I am getting better and better now that I am engaged. I actually haven’t experienced as many depressive episodes as I used to, and I feel more alive. Also, in Australia it has been incredibly hot for the past few days, going over 35C, and guess who got the courage to actually go on a walk… Wearing short sleeves! It’s actually the first time in around 2 years I have gone out in short sleeves! I am so fucking proud of myself agagagga

Also, guess what..

me and my fiancé decided we are going to get married in June. :3 (pride month! cuz it’s gay., and we are gay.. y’know.. I’m male.. he’s male.. 🏳️‍🌈.. get it? Laugh. Now.)

I need to stop yapping ughghguhgu.

ALSO YOU HAVE A BLAHAJ PLUSHIE WHETHER YOU LIKE IT OR NOT (in the bot)

okay goodbye pls leave a review and make sure to yell at my fiance for forgetting to add spinach into my bacon and spinach Mac&cheese dinner 😔🥺

also where did my twin go?!
creator: Phoenix_LP
